text:
A rising young athlete has died in a freak accident just weeks before he was set make his debut at the Paris Olympics.

Jackson James Rice, 18, tragically died in a freak diving accident just weeks before his scheduled Olympic debut in Paris.

Affectionately known as JJ, the 18-year-old was set to represent Tonga in kitefoil racing in July – he would have made history as the first Caucasian to represent the Polynesian island.

His father Darren Rice, confirmed to local media that JJ was free diving from a boat on Saturday when he died from a suspected shallow water blackout.

His body was recovered from the seafloor underneath the boat at about 12:15pm by divers.

Bystanders made attempts to resuscitate him but were unsuccessful.

JJ’s sister, Lily Rice, said her brother was “the most amazing funny unique person” who would have walked away from the Paris Olympics with a medal and an “even bigger smile”.

“I was blessed with the most amazing brother in the whole world and it pains me to say that he’s passed away,” Lily wrote.

“I don’t even know what to say, I don’t know what to do, or what to think. I miss JJ beyond belief, I’m in shock I still can't believe it and it will take all of us who loved JJ so long to feel ok again.

“He was so talented and was amazing at everything he tried, he was an amazing kitefoiler and he would have made it to the Olympics and come out with a big shiny medal and an even bigger smile.

“I will try my best to use what he taught me to be even a tiny bit as amazing as he was.”

JJ was born in the United States to British parents, Darren and Nina Rice, who own a lodge on Ha'apai Island.

Speaking to local media outlet, Matangi Tonga Online, JJ’s dad Darren remembered when his son, at 15 years old risked his life to save 18 people after their ferryboat capsized in heavy seas off Faleloa in 2021.

After taking to kitefoil racing at an early age, JJ recently trained in Italy in his bid to make it to next month's Olympic games, also competing in the 2024 Formula Kite World  Championships in Hyères in the South of France earlier this year.

title: Rising young athlete Jackson James Rice dies in tragic diving accident weeks before historic Paris Olympics debut for Tonga | Sky News Australia
description: Jackson James Rice, 18, tragically died in a freak diving accident just weeks before his scheduled Olympic debut in Paris.
